blocked_reason: host is macOS arm64 per docs/toolchain/riscv64-cross-host.md; LLVM RISC-V toolchain MUST be built inside the canonical Linux container described in docs/toolchain/iree-eliza-npu.md before any pinned-build evidence is accepted

upstream.trunk_pin_policy: refresh quarterly from a tested green commit; record the chosen SHA here and in docs/toolchain/llvm-trunk-pin.md in lockstep

rationale: RVA23 mandatory features (V, Zicboz, Zicbom, Zicfilp, Zicfiss, Zihintntl, Ztso, Zacas, Zfh, Zvfh, Zvbb) land progressively across LLVM 19-23
RVV 1.0 cost model and vector predication scheduling continue to land each release
AArch64-shared VLA scaffolding benefits RVV directly; trunk captures the most recent shared work
ThinLTO, BasicBlockSections + Propeller infrastructure, and Machine Function Splitter all evolve in trunk

build_environment.canonical: Linux x86_64 container built from packages/chip/Dockerfile
build_environment.host_disallowed: macOS arm64 host cannot build glibc-targeted RISC-V userspace; clang/llvm host-build is feasible but glibc cross-link tests require the Linux container

rva23_patches.policy: no out-of-tree patches required for the pinned SHA; if a patch becomes necessary, archive it under compiler/llvm-build/patches/<NNN>-<topic>.patch and list each here with upstream review URL plus rationale

pending_patches.title: [RISCV] Add Propeller support for RISC-V
pending_patches.pr_reviews: APPROVED x2 (wangpc-pp, topperc); libcxx-ci SUCCESS; Graphite mergeability_check SUCCESS
pending_patches.rebase_notes: Trunk landed COFF/x86 support for -fbasic-block-address-map between PR base and our pin; the RISC-V additions were merged into the new ELF triple guard. PR head applies cleanly except for that orthogonal change, which is reflected in the saved patch.
pending_patches.apply_verified: git apply --check on 2026-05-20 against pinned SHA — clean
pending_patches.rationale: Unblocks the future stage-3 PGO+Propeller+BOLT recipe documented in docs/toolchain/llvm-trunk-pin.md by enabling -fbasic-block-sections=labels|list= and -fbasic-block-address-map for riscv64-*-elf targets and providing the RISCVInstrInfo::insertNoop override Propeller requires.
pending_patches.remove_when: PR #170992 merges into trunk and our pin advances past the merge commit

openroad_deps.scope: version-refresh plan for external/openroad-deps; consumed on the next OpenROAD rebuild, not on LLVM rebuilds
